name: llama.cpp Server
description: llama.cpp is a high-performance LLM inference server with OpenAI-compatible API. This installation uses the Vulkan backend for GPU acceleration across AMD, Intel, and NVIDIA GPUs. Features automatic model downloading from HuggingFace, built-in web UI, and supports multiple concurrent requests.

notes.text: Access the Web UI at http://<IP>:8080
Default model: unsloth/Qwen3.5-9B-GGUF:Q8_0 (auto-downloaded on first start)
Requires GPU passthrough - configure in Proxmox before starting container
AMD GPU: Add 'dev0: /dev/kfd,gid=104' and 'dev1: /dev/dri/renderD128,gid=104' to container config
Intel GPU: Add 'dev0: /dev/dri/renderD128,gid=104' to container config
NVIDIA GPU: Requires nvidia-container-toolkit on host
